data.body: 5b01 sweep done: 18 files CLAUDE.md->AGENTS.md/docs (context-specific targets), plan-review-criteria-guide.md +2 fixed, committed .codex/config.toml (fallback->AGENTS.md) and .agents/rules/rebar.md (slim distillation ref AGENTS.md) via git add -f, per-tool-pointer DEFER decision recorded (operator-attested). AC1 sum=1 (only AGENTS.md's legit @import bridge ref - documented carve-out; the 17 owned files are clean). AC2 sum=0. Frozen eval corpus (docs/experiments) left untouched. Caught+fixed one E501 (test comment lengthened by the sweep). 1d75 spike CLOSED+SIGNED (comment records PASS on Claude Code 2.1.211). make lint green; make test running. Next: confirm make test, commit 5b01, push whole 5-change stack to Gerrit.
